REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,PLAINTIFFS DENNIS CRUZ, MARK GILLIAM MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AUGMENT PLAINTIFFS EXPERT WITNESS DISCLOSURE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS SHALL HAVE LEAVE TO AUGMENT THEIR EXPERT WITNESS DISCLOSURE TO REPLACE EXPERT WITNESS RICHARD DEVINE WITH PHILLIP ALLMAN. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INSTANT MOTION WAS PREMISED ON MOVING COUNSEL'S MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT PURSUANT TO CCP 2034.620. IN THE INTERESTS OF JUSTICE, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFFS SHALL PAY DEFENDANTS A TOTAL OF $1,125 FOR EXPENSES INCURRED IN PREPARING AND TAKING MR. DEVINE'S DEPOSITION. (CCP 2034.620(D).) THE WITNESS FEE PORTION WILL BE CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M, IN DEPT. 501. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. SUBJECT TO REVIEW OF THE ORDER. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DENNIS CRUZ, MARK GILLIAM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure is OFF CALENDAR per June 4, 2019 letter from parties.
Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure
Off Calendar May-31-2019 Continued To Jun-06-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq., 415-533-0735, appearing for Dennis Vruz, Plaintiff and moving party.

Ms. Lesniak, NO CARD PROVIDED.

ARGUED. The Court questioned what the expert witness fee of $800.00 is for. Ms. Lesniak stated that the $800.00 is the expert witness fee for one hour and 15 minutes. Ms. Weiderhold argued that there is a due process issue with the $800.00 and that there is no decleration regarding the fee. Ms. Lesniak reported that no bill was submitted and that it is based on transcript testimony. The Court stated that it would grant the tentative ruling expect to the witness fee issue and that portion will be continued to June 6, 2019 at 9:30 a.m, in Dept. 501. Parties waive notice.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS DENNIS CRUZ, MARK GILLIAM Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure is GRANTED. Plaintiffs shall have leave to augment their expert witness disclosure to replace expert witness Richard Devine with Phillip Allman. The Court finds that the instant motion was premised on moving counsel's mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect pursuant to CCP 2034.620. In the interests of justice, the Court determines that Plaintiffs shall pay Defendants a total of $1,125 for expenses incurred in preparing and taking Mr. Devine's deposition. (CCP 2034.620(d).) The witness fee portion will be continued to June 6, 2019 at 9:30 a.m, in Dept. 501. Parties waive notice. Subject to review of the order. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
